examples.title: Inline basic
examples.description: Horizontal row that wraps onto multiple lines on narrow viewports.
examples.code:
<script lang="ts">
  import { Inline } from 'cinder/inline';
</script>

<Inline>
  <button type="button">First</button>
  <button type="button">Second</button>
  <button type="button">Third</button>
  <button type="button">Fourth</button>
</Inline>
